claims.actual_supported_behavior: Web and Telegram intents share the assistant orchestration path.
claims.current_wording: Ask for help naturally.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Commands and internal capability IDs are not the primary discovery experience.
claims.current_wording: Capabilities are summarized by useful outcomes and current availability.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Approval is scoped, durable, single-use, and target-bound.
claims.current_wording: Nothing changes until approval; cancel is always offered.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Every supported mutation still requires preview and approval.
claims.current_wording: Controlled Mode changes what may be proposed; it never executes automatically.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Raw internal payloads are filtered from assistant messages.
claims.current_wording: Plain-language failure and next step come first; trace data is diagnostic detail.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Pack text remains untrusted and foreign code does not execute.
claims.current_wording: Foreign executable and plugin packs are unsupported.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Indeterminate external/destructive actions are not automatically retried.
claims.current_wording: An unknown outcome is neither success nor failure and must be reconciled before retry.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: User-directed durable memory changes require preview and approval.
claims.current_wording: Conversation context and durable saved memory are distinct.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Private content is excluded from approval and transaction artifacts.
claims.current_wording: Reset is destructive, scoped, single-use, and may not be reversible.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Executing/uncertain restores indeterminate and is never auto-resent.
claims.current_wording: Exactly-once external delivery is not promised.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Exact registered pack/version removal is centrally authorized.
claims.current_wording: Registered pack removal is confirmation-gated; arbitrary filesystem delete is denied.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: A pack begins with zero permissions and cannot approve itself.
claims.current_wording: Install, review approval, enablement, and grants are separate.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Process/OS isolation remains out of scope.
claims.current_wording: Universal authorization does not isolate malicious Python already running in the trusted process.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: URL and remote archive acquisition fail closed before network access.
claims.current_wording: Catalog discovery is metadata-only; arbitrary remote pack acquisition is unavailable.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Read/status and policy-allowed local behavior remain available.
claims.current_wording: SAFE MODE is the normal default and blocks specified higher-risk actions.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: The executor fixes service identity, loopback exposure, image tag, paths, and ports.
claims.current_wording: Status is immediate; setup is blocked in SAFE MODE and approval-gated in Controlled Mode.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Unexpected local drift invalidates approval; upstream tag movement remains unresolved.
claims.current_wording: The configured image tag and local runtime state are bound; immutable digest pinning remains release hardening.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Source policy grants no content trust or permission.
claims.current_wording: Allowlisted means queryable metadata, not trusted or installable.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: A changed or ambiguous target cannot be silently completed.
claims.current_wording: Done binds one exact task and version or asks for clarification.

claims.actual_supported_behavior: Disabled is neutral, creates no recovery warning, and no live contact occurs.
claims.current_wording: Telegram is optional and deliberately disabled.

journeys.expected: no automatic change and reliable cancellation
failure distinguished from unknown outcome; no blind retry
useful local assistant and grounded target status
saved/context distinction and strong reset warning
runtime-derived recommendation and bounded switch preview
short outcome-led suggestions tailored to runtime
honest setup help without invented model availability
metadata-only discovery and no fetch continuation
pending/receipt truth survives restart or fails closed
blocked reason and safe next action
nothing changed and fresh preview advice
exact target binding, clarification, timezone and restart continuity
